title: InterEdit: Navigating Text-Guided Multi-Human 3D Motion Editing
comment: The dataset and code will be released at https://github.com/YNG916/InterEdit
summary: Text-guided 3D motion editing has seen success in single-person scenarios, but its extension to multi-person settings is less explored due to limited paired data and the complexity of inter-person interactions. We introduce the task of multi-person 3D motion editing, where a target motion is generated from a source and a text instruction. To support this, we propose InterEdit3D, a new dataset with manual two-person motion change annotations, and a Text-guided Multi-human Motion Editing (TMME) benchmark. We present InterEdit, a synchronized classifier-free conditional diffusion model for TMME. It introduces Semantic-Aware Plan Token Alignment with learnable tokens to capture high-level interaction cues and an Interaction-Aware Frequency Token Alignment strategy using DCT and energy pooling to model periodic motion dynamics. Experiments show that InterEdit improves text-to-motion consistency and edit fidelity, achieving state-of-the-art TMME performance. The dataset and code will be released at https://github.com/YNG916/InterEdit.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文专注于文本引导的多人体3D运动编辑，直接涉及3D运动生成和编辑，与用户的"3D"兴趣高度相关。虽然论文主要关注运动而非几何重建，但3D运动编辑是3D内容生成的重要子领域，且论文使用了扩散模型等生成技术，与视频生成和世界模型也有间接关联。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个多人3D运动编辑任务，通过构建InterEdit3D数据集和TMME基准，开发了InterEdit模型，利用语义感知和交互感知的token对齐策略，在多人运动编辑中实现了更好的文本一致性和编辑保真度。
AI.motivation: 当前文本引导的3D运动编辑主要集中在单人场景，多人场景由于缺乏配对数据和复杂的人际交互而研究不足。本文旨在解决多人3D运动编辑的挑战。
AI.method: 提出InterEdit模型，采用同步无分类器条件扩散模型。引入语义感知计划token对齐（使用可学习token捕获高级交互线索）和交互感知频率token对齐策略（使用DCT和能量池化建模周期性运动动态）。
AI.result: 实验表明InterEdit在文本到运动一致性和编辑保真度方面均有提升，在TMME基准上达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统性地探索了多人3D运动编辑任务，通过构建数据集、基准和提出创新模型，为这一领域的发展奠定了基础。代码和数据集将开源。

title: IGASA: Integrated Geometry-Aware and Skip-Attention Modules for Enhanced Point Cloud Registration
summary: Point cloud registration (PCR) is a fundamental task in 3D vision and provides essential support for applications such as autonomous driving, robotics, and environmental modeling. Despite its widespread use, existing methods often fail when facing real-world challenges like heavy noise, significant occlusions, and large-scale transformations. These limitations frequently result in compromised registration accuracy and insufficient robustness in complex environments. In this paper, we propose IGASA as a novel registration framework constructed upon a Hierarchical Pyramid Architecture (HPA) designed for robust multi-scale feature extraction and fusion. The framework integrates two pivotal components consisting of the Hierarchical Cross-Layer Attention (HCLA) module and the Iterative Geometry-Aware Refinement (IGAR) module. The HCLA module utilizes skip attention mechanisms to align multi-resolution features and enhance local geometric consistency. Simultaneously, the IGAR module is designed for the fine matching phase by leveraging reliable correspondences established during coarse matching. This synergistic integration within the architecture allows IGASA to adapt effectively to diverse point cloud structures and intricate transformations. We evaluate the performance of IGASA on four widely recognized benchmark datasets including 3D(Lo)Match, KITTI, and nuScenes. Our extensive experiments consistently demonstrate that IGASA significantly surpasses state-of-the-art methods and achieves notable improvements in registration accuracy. This work provides a robust foundation for advancing point cloud registration techniques while offering valuable insights for practical 3D vision applications. The code for IGASA is available in \href{https://github.com/DongXu-Zhang/IGASA}{https://github.com/DongXu-Zhang/IGASA}.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文专注于点云配准，这是3D重建和几何处理的核心任务。论文提出的IGASA框架涉及层次金字塔架构、跨层注意力模块和迭代几何感知细化，直接与用户的"3D"、"3D Reconstruction"和"Geometric"兴趣相关。点云配准是3D视觉中的基础问题，为自主驾驶、机器人等应用提供支持，属于3D重建和几何处理的标准范畴。

AI.tldr: IGASA是一个基于分层金字塔架构的点云配准框架，通过分层跨层注意力模块和迭代几何感知细化模块，在多尺度特征提取和融合方面表现出色，显著提升了在噪声、遮挡和大尺度变换等复杂环境下的配准精度和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有点云配准方法在面对真实世界挑战（如严重噪声、显著遮挡和大尺度变换）时经常失败，导致配准精度受损和在复杂环境中鲁棒性不足。需要开发能够有效适应多样化点云结构和复杂变换的鲁棒配准框架。
AI.method: 提出IGASA框架，基于分层金字塔架构（HPA）进行鲁棒的多尺度特征提取和融合。包含两个关键组件：分层跨层注意力（HCLA）模块，利用跳跃注意力机制对齐多分辨率特征并增强局部几何一致性；迭代几何感知细化（IGAR）模块，在精细匹配阶段利用粗匹配阶段建立的可靠对应关系。
AI.result: 在3D(Lo)Match、KITTI和nuScenes四个广泛认可的基准数据集上进行评估，实验结果表明IGASA显著超越现有最先进方法，在配准精度方面取得了显著改进。
AI.conclusion: IGASA为推进点云配准技术提供了鲁棒基础，同时为实际3D视觉应用提供了有价值的见解。该框架通过分层架构和注意力机制有效适应多样化点云结构和复杂变换。

title: V-Bridge: Bridging Video Generative Priors to Versatile Few-shot Image Restoration
comment: Transfer the prior knowledge of video generative models to image restoration tasks
summary: Large-scale video generative models are trained on vast and diverse visual data, enabling them to internalize rich structural, semantic, and dynamic priors of the visual world. While these models have demonstrated impressive generative capability, their potential as general-purpose visual learners remains largely untapped. In this work, we introduce V-Bridge, a framework that bridges this latent capacity to versatile few-shot image restoration tasks. We reinterpret image restoration not as a static regression problem, but as a progressive generative process, and leverage video models to simulate the gradual refinement from degraded inputs to high-fidelity outputs. Surprisingly, with only 1,000 multi-task training samples (less than 2% of existing restoration methods), pretrained video models can be induced to perform competitive image restoration, achieving multiple tasks with a single model, rivaling specialized architectures designed explicitly for this purpose. Our findings reveal that video generative models implicitly learn powerful and transferable restoration priors that can be activated with only extremely limited data, challenging the traditional boundary between generative modeling and low-level vision, and opening a new design paradigm for foundation models in visual tasks.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文虽然主要关注图像修复任务，但其核心创新在于利用视频生成模型的先验知识。用户兴趣中的"Video Generation"（视频生成）直接匹配，因为论文研究的是大规模视频生成模型的内在能力和迁移学习。此外，论文探讨的"generative modeling"（生成建模）也与用户的"World Model"（世界模型）兴趣相关，因为视频生成模型学习的是视觉世界的结构和动态先验。

AI.tldr: V-Bridge框架利用预训练视频生成模型作为通用视觉学习器，通过少量样本（仅1000个）激活其内在的图像修复能力，实现多任务统一修复
AI.motivation: 大规模视频生成模型在丰富视觉数据上训练，内化了视觉世界的结构、语义和动态先验，但这些模型作为通用视觉学习器的潜力尚未被充分挖掘。传统图像修复方法需要大量数据和专门架构，而视频模型可能隐含强大的修复先验知识。
AI.method: 提出V-Bridge框架，将图像修复重新定义为渐进生成过程而非静态回归问题。利用视频生成模型模拟从退化输入到高保真输出的逐步细化过程。仅使用1000个多任务训练样本（不到现有方法的2%）来激活预训练视频模型的修复能力。
AI.result: 预训练视频模型能够执行具有竞争力的图像修复，单个模型可处理多个修复任务，性能与专门设计的架构相当。这表明视频生成模型隐含学习了强大且可迁移的修复先验，仅需极少数据即可激活。
AI.conclusion: 视频生成模型隐含学习到的修复先验可以极少量数据激活，挑战了生成建模与低级视觉之间的传统界限，为视觉任务中的基础模型开辟了新的设计范式。

title: Geometry-Guided Camera Motion Understanding in VideoLLMs
summary: Camera motion is a fundamental geometric signal that shapes visual perception and cinematic style, yet current video-capable vision-language models (VideoLLMs) rarely represent it explicitly and often fail on fine-grained motion primitives. We address this gap with a framework of $\textbf{benchmarking}$, $\textbf{diagnosis}$, and $\textbf{injection}$. We curate $\textbf{CameraMotionDataset}$, a large-scale synthetic dataset with explicit camera control, formulate camera motion as constraint-aware multi-label recognition, and construct a VQA benchmark--$\textbf{CameraMotionVQA}$. Across diverse off-the-shelf VideoLLMs, we observe substantial errors in recognizing camera motion primitives. Probing experiments on a Qwen2.5-VL vision encoder suggest that camera motion cues are weakly represented, especially in deeper ViT blocks, helping explain the observed failure modes. To bridge this gap without costly training or fine-tuning, we propose a lightweight, model-agnostic pipeline that extracts geometric camera cues from 3D foundation models (3DFMs), predicts constrained motion primitives with a temporal classifier, and injects them into downstream VideoLLM inference via structured prompting. Experiments demonstrate improved motion recognition and more camera-aware model responses, highlighting geometry-driven cue extraction and structured prompting as practical steps toward a camera-aware VideoLLM and VLA system. The dataset and benchmark is publicly available at https://hf.co/datasets/fengyee/camera-motion-dataset-and-benchmark.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文与用户的多个研究兴趣直接相关：1) 视频生成（Video Generation）中的相机运动理解，2) 3D重建（3D Reconstruction）中使用的3D基础模型提取几何相机线索，3) 几何（Geometric）信号在视觉感知中的应用。论文明确涉及视频LLM中的几何相机运动理解，使用3D基础模型提取几何线索，这与用户的3D、几何和视频生成兴趣高度相关。

AI.tldr: 本文针对当前视频语言模型在相机运动识别上的不足，提出了包含基准测试、诊断和注入的三步框架，通过合成数据集和几何线索提取来提升模型对相机运动的理解能力。
AI.motivation: 相机运动是塑造视觉感知和电影风格的基本几何信号，但当前的视频语言模型很少显式表示相机运动，并且在细粒度运动原语识别上经常失败。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出了包含基准测试、诊断和注入的三步框架：1）构建大规模合成数据集CameraMotionDataset；2）将相机运动建模为约束感知的多标签识别问题；3）提出轻量级、模型无关的管道，从3D基础模型中提取几何相机线索，使用时序分类器预测约束运动原语，并通过结构化提示注入到下游视频语言模型推理中。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有视频语言模型在识别相机运动原语时存在显著错误。通过提出的方法，模型在运动识别和相机感知响应方面得到改善，几何驱动的线索提取和结构化提示被证明是构建相机感知视频语言系统的实用步骤。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过系统性的基准测试、诊断和注入框架，有效提升了视频语言模型对相机运动的理解能力，为构建相机感知的视频语言系统提供了实用解决方案。数据集和基准测试已公开可用。
